title: Tiny Spells
description: Mod about Magic and PVP! For example, Wand of Atonement, has an ability of healing 40% of your health when used, which has a 20 second cooldown and no durability!
body:
TinySpells adds a collection of compact magic tools designed to fit naturally into survival gameplay. The mod introduces several magical wands, including a Healing Wand, each with unique abilities and cooldown-based mechanics.

In addition to its magic tools, TinySpells features one extremely powerful sword that serves as a mid-game option and requires significant effort to obtain. The mod is designed to feel impactful without overwhelming vanilla gameplay.

This release is a beta, and balance or mechanics may change in future updates.
Netherite Heart is going to have a use in the next update


Requires Fabric Api -0.16.4  or above
